race.comment: INTERNAL AFFAIRS (9) smart colt resuming. Found Where's The Circus too sharp last start when second over 1000m in the LR Inglis Nursery at Randwick six-and-a-half months ago. Primed with the two sharp trials and the cross-over nose band goes on. Gets his chance from the inside gate. SKYSTONE (11) Portland Sky two-year-old gelding from Rockarosa on debut for the Tom Charlton stable. Won a recent trial here in good style and shapes as a live winning chance. RADICALS (8) sat on the good speed on debut with a game second over 1000m at this track. Drawn out again but has the upside to go close. THEANDER (12) two-year-old Anders filly from The Wasp on debut for the Portelli camp. Has shown enough in her trials to suggest a forward showing is on the cards.
